title: Front Office Manager - Taj SATS Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Taj SATS Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj SATS Digital Technologies:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS Digital Technologies!
